steps.title: Find the sentence's role
steps.content: The underlined sentence explains why the Blackfeet main characters in My Heart Is a Chainsaw matter: they help ensure Indigenous people have a place in horror fiction.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice A makes a future prediction the sentence does not make. Choice B invents a challenge to an autobiographical claim. Choice D describes a question the passage never asks. The sentence highlights the cultural significance of Indigenous representation in the novel. The answer is C.
